items.name: ViewConfig
items.doc:
Per-view shell chrome configuration.
`None` / empty = "don't override the DSL value".

items.name: eval_script
items.signature: pub fn eval_script(script: &str) -> Result<ViewConfig, Box<dyn Error>>
items.doc: Evaluate a Rhai script string and return a `ViewConfig`.

items.name: eval_file
items.signature: pub fn eval_file(path: &Path) -> Result<ViewConfig, Box<dyn Error>>
items.doc: Load and evaluate a single `.rhai` file.

items.name: load_all
items.signature: pub fn load_all(dir: &Path) -> Result<HashMap<String, ViewConfig>, Box<dyn Error>>
items.doc:
Scan `dir/*.rhai` and return a map of `{stem → ViewConfig}`.
Missing or empty directory is not an error — returns an empty map.

items.name: apply
items.doc:
Apply non-None / non-empty `ViewConfig` fields to the `AppWindow`.
Fields that are `None` or empty are left unchanged.
